problem id: e124d12a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) OR NOT SHR(4)

examples:
  11111000 -> 11111100
  10000010 -> 11110111
  10101110 -> 11110111
  10101100 -> 11110111
  11000111 -> 11110011
  00011011 -> 11111111
  00010101 -> 11111110
  10011010 -> 11111111
  00010000 -> 11111110

query: 11111010
predicted answer: 11111101
